description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest to test with multiple Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11). For each version, check out the repository, install Miniforge, create a test environment with conda, activate it, install the package, run tests with coverage, and optionally upload coverage to Codecov for Python 3.8.
